title: [BUG] Typescript interface WorksheetProtection does not define spinCount
author: ericxinzhang
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.3.0

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

[WorksheetProtection](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/index.d.ts#L867) does not define `spinCount` which is in the document.

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Add `spinCount` to `WorksheetProtection` interface.

comments.author: medero1988
comments.body: Holas, alguna novedad con la solución a este problema, que nos esta afectando el cpu de nuestras aplicaciones. sldos

comments.author: chjalmar
comments.body: @Siemienik Hello, have you guys checked this out? it would be a very helpful solution to avoid some app crashes... is there any way we could contribute to this? please let me know! Thanks!

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
We're going to migrate the whole code into TS somewhen. Then all the current ts errors will be resolved. At this moment the best idea is opening a PullRequest with update into `index.d.ts`.
To avoid TS crash you can use `// @ts-expect-error ` or `@ts-ignore`.
